headline: AI Datacenter Growth Likely to Power NVIDIA's Strong Q1 Revenues
summary: NVDA eyes about $78B in Q1 revenues as booming AI datacenter chip demand fuels surging earnings expectations.

headline: TCEHY Stock Declines 4% as Q1 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
summary: Tencent shares slide after Q1 misses, though AI-led ad growth, gaming gains and rising cloud demand support revenue growth.
